name: video-template-hyperframes-logo-outro-cinematic
title: HyperFrames: 4-Second Cinematic Logo Outro

title_i18n.zh-CN: HyperFrames：4 秒电影级 Logo 片尾
title_i18n.zh-TW: HyperFrames：4 秒電影級 Logo 片尾
title_i18n.ja: HyperFrames：4秒シネマティックロゴアウトロ
title_i18n.fr: HyperFrames : Outro de Logo Cinématique de 4 Secondes
title_i18n.es: HyperFrames: Outro Cinemático de Logo de 4 Segundos
title_i18n.pt-BR: HyperFrames: Outro Cinematográfico de Logo de 4 Segundos
title_i18n.it: HyperFrames: Outro Logo Cinematografico di 4 Secondi
title_i18n.vi: HyperFrames: Logo Outro Điện Ảnh 4 Giây
title_i18n.ar: HyperFrames: خاتمة شعار سينمائية مدتها 4 ثوانٍ

description: A 4-second 16:9 logo outro — piece-by-piece wordmark assembly with bloom, shimmer sweep across the final lockup, soft grain overlay, single-line CTA. Built on the HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep`, and `grain-overlay` blocks.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 4 秒 16:9 Logo 片尾动画——逐块组装文字标识，配合光晕效果、闪光扫过最终锁定画面、柔和颗粒叠加层和单行 CTA。基于 HyperFrames 的 `logo-outro`、`shimmer-sweep` 和 `grain-overlay` 模块构建。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 4 秒 16:9 Logo 片尾動畫——逐塊組裝文字標識，配合光暈效果、閃光掃過最終鎖定畫面、柔和顆粒疊加層和單行 CTA。基於 HyperFrames 的 `logo-outro`、`shimmer-sweep` 和 `grain-overlay` 模組建構。
description_i18n.ja: 4秒の16:9ロゴアウトロ——ワードマークを断片的に組み立て、ブルーム効果、最終ロックアップを横切るシマースイープ、ソフトグレインオーバーレイ、1行のCTAを搭載。HyperFramesの`logo-outro`、`shimmer-sweep`、`grain-overlay`ブロックで構築。
description_i18n.ko: 4초 16:9 로고 아웃트로 — 조각별 워드마크 조립, 블룸 효과, 최종 락업을 가로지르는 쉬머 스윕, 부드러운 그레인 오버레이, 단일 라인 CTA 포함. HyperFrames의 `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep`, `grain-overlay` 블록으로 구축되었습니다.
description_i18n.de: Ein 4-sekündiges 16:9-Logo-Outro – schrittweiser Aufbau der Wortmarke mit Bloom-Effekt, Shimmer-Sweep über das finale Lockup, sanftes Grain-Overlay und einzeiliger CTA. Basiert auf den HyperFrames-Blöcken `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` und `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.fr: Un outro de logo 16:9 de 4 secondes — assemblage progressif du logotype avec bloom, balayage scintillant sur le lockup final, overlay de grain doux et CTA sur une ligne. Construit sur les blocs HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` et `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.ru: 4-секундный аутро с логотипом 16:9 — поэтапная сборка текстового логотипа с bloom-эффектом, мерцающей развёрткой по финальной композиции, мягким зерновым оверлеем и однострочным CTA. Создан на блоках HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` и `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.es: Un outro de logo 16:9 de 4 segundos — ensamblaje pieza por pieza del logotipo con bloom, barrido de brillo sobre el lockup final, superposición de grano suave y CTA de una línea. Construido sobre los bloques de HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` y `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um outro de logo 16:9 de 4 segundos — montagem peça por peça do logotipo com bloom, varredura de brilho pelo lockup final, overlay de grão suave e CTA de linha única. Construído nos blocos HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` e `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.it: Un outro logo 16:9 di 4 secondi — assemblaggio progressivo del wordmark con bloom, sweep luccicante sul lockup finale, overlay di grana morbida e CTA su una riga. Costruito sui blocchi HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` e `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.vi: Logo outro 16:9 dài 4 giây — lắp ráp từng phần wordmark với hiệu ứng bloom, quét shimmer trên lockup cuối cùng, lớp phủ hạt mềm và CTA một dòng. Xây dựng trên các khối HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` và `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.pl: 4-sekundowe outro z logo 16:9 — składanie logo element po elemencie z efektem bloom, przesunięcie mieniacym się blaskiem po finalnym lockupie, miękka nakładka ziarna i jednoliniowe CTA. Zbudowane na blokach HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` i `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.id: Outro logo 16:9 berdurasi 4 detik — perakitan wordmark per bagian dengan bloom, sapuan kilauan di lockup akhir, overlay grain lembut, dan CTA satu baris. Dibangun di atas blok HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep`, dan `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.nl: Een 4-seconden 16:9 logo-outro — stuk-voor-stuk wordmark-assemblage met bloom, shimmer-sweep over het uiteindelijke lockup, zachte grain-overlay en één-regel CTA. Gebouwd op de HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` en `grain-overlay` blokken.
description_i18n.ar: خاتمة شعار 16:9 مدتها 4 ثوانٍ — تجميع العلامة النصية قطعة قطعة مع تأثير bloom، ومسح لامع عبر التصميم النهائي، وطبقة حبيبات ناعمة، وCTA من سطر واحد. مبني على كتل HyperFrames `logo-outro` و`shimmer-sweep` و`grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.tr: 4 saniyelik 16:9 logo outro — parça parça wordmark montajı, bloom efekti, final lockup üzerinde shimmer sweep, yumuşak grain overlay ve tek satırlık CTA. HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` ve `grain-overlay` bloklarıyla oluşturulmuştur.
description_i18n.uk: 4-секундний аутро з логотипом 16:9 — поетапне складання текстового логотипу з ефектом bloom, мерехтливою розгорткою фінальної композиції, м'яким зерновим оверлеєм та однорядковим CTA. Побудовано на блоках HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep` та `grain-overlay`.
description_i18n.en: A 4-second 16:9 logo outro — piece-by-piece wordmark assembly with bloom, shimmer sweep across the final lockup, soft grain overlay, single-line CTA. Built on the HyperFrames `logo-outro`, `shimmer-sweep`, and `grain-overlay` blocks.

query.en:
Build a 4-second HyperFrames logo outro (1920×1080, 30fps) for a brand end-card. Pull `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`, `npx hyperframes add shimmer-sweep`, and `npx hyperframes add grain-overlay`.

Visual identity: deep ink #07070a, single jewel accent #f0c14b, off-white #f7f3e8, secondary mauve #b8a3c8 used only on a 1px hairline rule. Display: "General Sans" 200px for the wordmark; body "Inter" 24px tracked +6% small caps for the CTA line.

Layer structure:
• Track 0: full-bleed background. Solid #07070a with a centered radial glow #f0c14b at 14% opacity, 720px diameter, sized by the bloom on landing.
• Track 1: grain-overlay block at 8% opacity, full duration.
• Track 2: logo-outro block in the center. Override the wordmark text via a slot to the user's brand name (default: "OPEN DESIGN").
• Track 3: shimmer-sweep block running across the wordmark once, starting at 2.0s, lasting 0.8s.
• Track 4: CTA line (one of: "open-design.dev", "github.com/nexu-io/open-design") at y=72%, fades in at 2.6s.

Animation (4s total):
• 0–0.3s — empty stage, grain ramps from 0 → 8% opacity.
• 0.3–1.7s — logo-outro built-in choreography: each glyph piece flies in from random offsets (use the block's seeded variant — DO NOT rewrite with Math.random) and assembles, ease expo.out, 1.4s.
• 1.7–2.0s — radial glow pulses scale 0.96 → 1.04 → 1, 1.2s ease sine.inOut, simulating a bloom hit.
• 2.0–2.8s — shimmer-sweep slides across the assembled wordmark using its built-in CSS gradient mask.
• 2.6–3.4s — CTA line rises from y=20→0, opacity 0→1 ease power3.out 0.7s.
• 3.4–4.0s — final hold, grain continues, no exits.

Non-negotiables: deterministic only — use the block's built-in seed; no `repeat: -1` (calculate explicit cycle count from duration if you keep grain animated); entrance-only; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=4. Run lint and validate (contrast on the CTA line must clear 4.5:1 against the dark canvas).

Output: `logo-outro-4s.mp4`.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 4-second HyperFrames logo outro (1920×1080, 30fps) for a brand end-card. Pull `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`, `npx hyperframes add shimmer-sweep`, and `npx hyperframes add grain-overlay`.

Visual identity: deep ink #07070a, single jewel accent #f0c14b, off-white #f7f3e8, secondary mauve #b8a3c8 used only on a 1px hairline rule. Display: "General Sans" 200px for the wordmark; body "Inter" 24px tracked +6% small caps for the CTA line.

Layer structure:
• Track 0: full-bleed background. Solid #07070a with a centered radial glow #f0c14b at 14% opacity, 720px diameter, sized by the bloom on landing.
• Track 1: grain-overlay block at 8% opacity, full duration.
• Track 2: logo-outro block in the center. Override the wordmark text via a slot to the user's brand name (default: "OPEN DESIGN").
• Track 3: shimmer-sweep block running across the wordmark once, starting at 2.0s, lasting 0.8s.
• Track 4: CTA line (one of: "open-design.dev", "github.com/nexu-io/open-design") at y=72%, fades in at 2.6s.

Animation (4s total):
• 0–0.3s — empty stage, grain ramps from 0 → 8% opacity.
• 0.3–1.7s — logo-outro built-in choreography: each glyph piece flies in from random offsets (use the block's seeded variant — DO NOT rewrite with Math.random) and assembles, ease expo.out, 1.4s.
• 1.7–2.0s — radial glow pulses scale 0.96 → 1.04 → 1, 1.2s ease sine.inOut, simulating a bloom hit.
• 2.0–2.8s — shimmer-sweep slides across the assembled wordmark using its built-in CSS gradient mask.
• 2.6–3.4s — CTA line rises from y=20→0, opacity 0→1 ease power3.out 0.7s.
• 3.4–4.0s — final hold, grain continues, no exits.

Non-negotiables: deterministic only — use the block's built-in seed; no `repeat: -1` (calculate explicit cycle count from duration if you keep grain animated); entrance-only; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=4. Run lint and validate (contrast on the CTA line must clear 4.5:1 against the dark canvas).

Output: `logo-outro-4s.mp4`.
